output:
[Unit]
Description=Gitea
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=git
Group=git
WorkingDirectory=/home/jose/gitea
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/gitea web --work-path /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea --config /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini
Restart=always
RestartSec=3s
Environment=HOME=/home/jose/gitea USER=git

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
---
